milestone_close_status.M236: closed-on-gate (gate MET 29/29; deferral-audit RED escalated at close, see CLOSE-D2)

supply_chain.note: npm audit clean on both TS packages (stack-verify/e2e, playthroughs/e2e); no new Go module added across the release

measurement_method.go: gotestsum --junitfile, tallied from parsed JUnit XML (testcase elements, includes subtests + fuzz seeds)
measurement_method.go_reproducible_funcs: git grep -E '^func Test' -- '*.go' — the cross-release like-for-like method re-anchored at M234
measurement_method.python: pytest --junit-xml, tallied from parsed JUnit XML (testcase elements; pytest subtests are NOT separate testcase elements)
measurement_method.typescript: playwright test --reporter=junit on the *.unit.spec.ts subset, tallied from parsed XML; live-browser specs enumerated via playwright test --list
measurement_method.counting_hazard: v2.3's Python figures counted pytest SUBTESTS into the section totals (stack-core 182 = 152 testcases + 30 subtests). This release's Python figures are JUnit testcase counts only. The apparent stack-core 182 -> 152 is a METHOD ARTIFACT, not a regression — the D17 / incident-#6 counting hazard. Do not file it as a test-count decrease.

demo-stack.note: the standing carry, clean-clone macOS reading — matches the M236 re-baseline exactly

stack-core.note: 152/152 on 2 of 3 full-suite runs; 1 flaky failure — see flakes

python.status: YELLOW — 8 standing test-side debt failures (0 real defects) + 2 flakes

typescript_playwright.note: 39 live-browser specs require a running demo stack and were NOT executed at release close. The e2e collection-integrity guards added at M236 (test_e2e_collection_integrity.py) confirm the suite registers a real test count — the M236 zero-collection defect cannot silently recur.

standing_failures.clone_state: CLEAN — the 6 clone-dependent failures of the carried 14 did not reproduce, confirming the stack-demo clone set is pristine
standing_failures.composition: 7 stale assertions against deliberately-changed behaviour (4 M53 academy-link, 2 M218 overlay, 1 M215 browser-port list) + 1 macOS environment-conditional test missing a skipUnless(Linux) guard
standing_failures.note: M236's own metrics.json recorded demo-stack 716 passed / 14 failed — that was the DIRTY-clone reading taken before the re-baseline. The clean-clone reading is 8, and that is what reproduces here.

flakes.cause: timing — polls a 2 s budget (100 x 0.02 s) for the SIGTERM trap handler to unlink the lockfile; loses the race under CPU contention
flakes.note: pre-existing host-isolation test; not named in any prior ledger, so it is a NEWLY-SURFACED flake, not a newly-introduced one

flakes.observed: 1 failure in 3 full-suite runs; 6/6 green in 3 isolated runs of the file
flakes.cause: the battery spawns a nested pytest over an unmutated subject and asserts it is GREEN before reading mutants; under full-suite load one of 3 inner dev-wiring tests fails, tripping the harness self-check
flakes.note: M236 recorded these as '2 pre-existing failures'; they are in fact non-deterministic — 0 deterministic failures observed across 2 subsequent full-suite runs

coverage.note: cmd/content-capture is deliberately low — captureSession/main are the DB-bound live prod-read surface; only pure helpers are unit-reachable (M235 record).

benchmarks.metric: p95 click -> ACCESS (authenticated shell rendered + interactive)
benchmarks.environment: billion.taildc510.ts.net (Tailscale Linux VM), COLD reset-to-seed, M236 iter-10
benchmarks.vs_v2_4: v2.4 M228 recruiter p95 1270 ms; v2.5 employee 1220 ms / manager 1510 ms — same order, all far inside the 5000 ms gate. Vantages differ, so this is not a strict like-for-like.
benchmarks.scope_note: HERO vantages only (user decision B2). Content-seat latency is OUT OF SCOPE for v2.5.

primary_gate.name: landed-non-empty (session x action) pairs, live on billion, cold reset-to-seed

by_product.skill-path-legacy: 2/2 (player-only; no manager surface exists on the platform)

primary_gate.provenance_caveat: The 29/29 reading was taken on playbill-m236-hardened. The M236 close then fixed 10 harness defects, unit-proven (66 harness specs) but NOT re-run live — see M236 decisions.md CLOSE-D3.

net_new_tests.note: per-milestone as recorded; not summable into the Go func delta, which spans different languages and counting bases

go_test_func_delta.method: git grep -E '^func Test' -- '*.go' at casting-call-m228-render-probe-fix vs 08badf1
go_test_func_delta.note: M233's metrics.json quoted 1902 for v2.4 M227 via a non-reproducible method; M234 re-anchored to the git-grep method. 1879 is the git-grep reading at the final v2.4 tag and is the correct like-for-like baseline.

suites_not_run: stack-verify/e2e live-browser specs (24) — require a running demo stack
playthroughs/e2e live Playthroughs (15) — require a running demo stack
the content-stories live sweep (run-content-stories.sh) — requires billion + a cold reset-to-seed
headline: Content stories — real production job-simulation sessions, scrubbed and re-tenanted into a demo org, projected into a cockpit tab, and PROVEN to land non-empty for both player and manager vantages: 29/29 live on billion on a cold reset-to-seed, p95 click->ACCESS 1.22 s employee / 1.51 s manager. 0 platform-repo edits across all 8 milestones.
